description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named chores that runs on push to the main branch. The workflow should have two jobs: regen-i18n and code-format, both running on ubuntu-latest. The regen-i18n job should check out the code, cancel previous runs, fetch submodules, install gettext, regenerate i18n files with make regen-i18n, clean up, and create a pull request. The code-format job should check out the code, cancel previous runs, fetch submodules, format code with ./tools/code-format/format.sh, and create a pull request.
